name: gowth-mem
description: Single-plugin marketplace for gowth-mem — global topic-organized memory layer for Claude Code.

plugins.name: gowth-mem
plugins.description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. v3.5.1: precompact NEVER blocks /compact (was: HARD-BLOCK on raw-dump failure). v3.5: deterministic transcript raw-dump on PreCompact. v3.4: tag-aware FTS5 dedup, /mem-dream consolidation (Light/REM/Deep), /mem-recall, consolidated hooks. Auto pull/push around /compact, multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution, deterministic FTS5 BM25 recall.
